positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, stylized line art composition, featuring stylized abstract animals (fox, deer, bear) integrated into a patterned woodland pattern. The forest elements are composed of clean, solid silhouettes and interwoven geometric shapes like triangles and semicircles. Dominant color palette: muted terracotta, sage green, and deep indigo, with high contrast against a creamy off-white background. The design should be perfectly centered, suitable for seamless repeat or apparel print placement, with strong outlines and clear separation between elements. Style: Mid-Century Modern graphic design, inspired by Nordic folk art and sophisticated abstract wallpaper. Flat vector illustration quality, high detail, highly legible.
negative: blur, noisy, bokeh, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, fuzzy, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render
